understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the level by moving a currently selected piece around the grid to ultimately reach the goal tile(s) (marked as +), potentially coordinating between multiple selectable pieces to do so within the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Positions were given as pixel coordinates where each grid cell corresponded to a 3-pixel step; MOVE actions attempted to shift the selected piece by one cell (±3 in x or y). Movement could be blocked by walls or objects, but the provided movement_blocked hints were only heuristic and didn’t guarantee failure. Some adjacent objects (e.g., blocks) were pushable and could be pushed if directly next to the selected piece in the movement direction. Levels could contain multiple selectable pieces; using CLICK with an exact on-screen/pixel position switched control to the selectable at that position.

understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the level by moving a currently selected piece around the grid to ultimately reach the goal tile(s) (marked as +), potentially coordinating between multiple selectable pieces to do so within the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Positions were given as pixel coordinates where each grid cell corresponded to a 3-pixel step; MOVE actions attempted to shift the selected piece by one cell (±3 in x or y). Levels could contain multiple selectable pieces; using CLICK with an exact on-screen/pixel position switched control to the selectable at that position.
